narrative:
St Clairsville-Richland City Sd city school district has 9,848 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.9% D−R vs -6.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
